limitations: Instagram follower_count historical insight is limited by Meta to the last 30 days, so long-range follower growth is represented through current community size plus reach, views, profile visits, website taps, and content-level engagement trends.
Instagram media insights are lifetime values for media published in the reporting period.

Facebook New Pages Experience no longer exposes several legacy post impression metrics; Facebook post analysis uses organic post objects plus reactions, comments, shares, clicks, and video views where available.

media.caption: High heat, higher vibes. ☀️ Staying fresh all summer with Armaf Odyssey Soda Pop.
Current obsession: Unlocked. 🔑 If you haven’t tried Armaf Odyssey Soda Pop yet, what are you waiting for?

Opens like a chilled glass of craft cola; settles like a warm, luxurious embrace. 🧊✨ Odyssey Soda Pop brings the perfect contrast of icy citrus, spicy black tea, and rich vanilla bourbon. It’s playful energy, elevated.

The wait is over. A new intensity takes over the night. Not louder. Just impossible to ignore. Club De Nuit Intense Overdose is here. And it stays with you longer than expected. Hard to get over. Get it exclusively at www.armaf.com #Armaf #ClubDeNuitIntenseOverdose #HardToGetOver #newlaunch

The wait is over. The vault is open. What was once locked away as an icon is now released into circulation. Club De Nuit Intense Overdose is here. And once it’s in, it’s hard to get over. Shop exclusively www.armaf.com #Armaf #ClubDeNuitIntenseOverdose #HardToGetOver #NewLaunch

The pursuit ends here. Weeks of anticipation. Countless theories. One unforgettable reveal. Club De Nuit Intense Overdose. Hard To Get Over. Shop Exclusively at www.armaf.com #Armaf #ClubDeNuitIntenseOverdose #HardToGetOver #newlaunch
A new obsession is about to unfold. Quietly. Cleanly. Classified. Once it begins, there’s no going back. #Armaf #ComingSoon
It’s closer than it appears… #Armaf #ComingSoon

Some fragrances get noticed. Some get remembered. And then there are the rare few that become part of the culture. Club de Nuit Intense wasn’t just a fragrance. It was the recommendation. The blind buy. The compliment magnet. The bottle that kept finding its way back onto shelves around the world. When something reaches that level, expectations aren’t just high. They’re impossible. Which is exactly why what comes next had to be worth the wait. A new chapter is about to begin. And legacy has never smelled this exciting. #ClubDeNuitLegacy #Armaf #ComingSoon

Every fragrance house has a bestseller. Very few have a legend. Club de Nuit Intense didn’t follow trends. It created a movement. From first sprays to signature scent status, it earned its place in fragrance history. But every legend reaches a moment where it evolves. The next chapter is almost here. And it’s bringing something nobody saw coming. #ClubDeNuitLegacy #Armaf #ComingSoon

Pop the top on playful energy with Armaf Odyssey Soda Pop. 🥤🍋 This fragrance opens with an unexpected, icy splash of chilled cola, mint, and zesty citrus. As it settles, it melts into a warm, spiced heart of black tea and cinnamon, finishing with an intoxicating trail of Vanilla Bourbon and Amberwood. Smell the spark.

Effervescent, playful, and completely unique. Armaf Odyssey Soda Pop is a vibrant citrus blend that balances an energetic opening with a smooth, magnetic dry-down of tonka bean and sandalwood. Perfect for those who light up every room.
Chilled cola, bright citrus, and vanilla bourbon. 🧊🍋🥃 Your fragrance wardrobe just got a major, effervescent upgrade with Armaf Odyssey Soda Pop.
Meet your new date night signature: Armaf Odyssey Artisto. The kind of fragrance that makes them lean in just a little bit closer.
The night belongs to you. 🌙🖤 Step into the shadows and leave an unforgettable trail with Armaf Odyssey Artisto.

Main character energy, from dusk till dawn. With the Unisex scent of Armaf Odyssey Artisto, you don’t just step out, you own the night. Opening with aromatic Sage, this woody masterpiece quickly pulls you into an alluring heart of Coconut and warm spice. By midnight, it settles into a deeply magnetic base of Amber and Tonka Bean. Your secret weapon for after dark.
Master the art of understated regality with Armaf Old Money. A scent journey that opens with vibrant clarity and dries down into a warm, commanding base of Clean Musk and Smoke.

Elegance is a silent language. Speak volumes with the tailored tradition of Silky Lavender melting seamlessly into a dark, seductive heart of Black Licorice Root and Cocoa Powder. Own the narrative with Armaf Old Money.
True wealth whispers. An aura of inherited elegance and unspoken refinement. The timeless signature of Armaf Old Money.
The higher you climb, the clearer the vision. Define your space and set the standard with Club de Nuit Intense.
Celebrate the beauty of the game and the quiet victories that follow with Club de Nuit Intense Man.

Don't miss the chance to celebrate the extraordinary men in your life with a premium scent upgrade. For a limited time only, take advantage of our exclusive Father's Day Sale event, with up to 30% OFF.
The world is a stadium and Club de Nuit Intense Man is the game.
Spartacus Eau de Parfum performs with zero hesitation and maximum execution. When you look good, you play good. When you smell good, you feel unstoppable.
Early mornings. Late nights. Unshakable focus. Smells like the dedication it takes to be number one. Command what is already yours with Armaf Spartacus Eau De Parfum.
Behind every great victory are thousands of hours no one saw. Honor the hustle with Armaf Spartacus Eau De Parfum.
Unleash your modern signature with Armaf Club de Nuit Iconic Extrait de Parfum. A masterful composition where the sharp, energetic edge of ginger meets the dark allure of incense and rich amber.

Unleash the ultimate concentration of sophistication with Club de Nuit Iconic Extrait de Parfum. More depth, richer sillage, and undeniably iconic. This is a statement for those who enter a room and command it.
Striking the perfect balance between zesty lemon, warm nutmeg, and earthy patchouli. Armaf Club de Nuit Iconic Extrait de Parfum is experienced through your daily ritual.
When you need a fragrance that speaks before you do, Armaf Checkmate King is the only move to make. Bold, long-lasting, and relentlessly sophisticated.

Checkmate King is a fragrance for those who play to win. It opens with the sweet, vibrant rush of Mirabelle plum before melting into a warm, addictive heart of roasted chestnut and spice. As it settles, a luxurious base of amber, sandalwood, and smooth balsamic resins leaves a trail of pure authority. Own the board.
The King has made his move. CHECKMATE KING is a commanding fragrance that enchants with its bold blend of fruity, floral, and woody notes.
You can leave the room, but your attitude will always stay. 🖤✨ . Miss Armaf Attitude, an unmistakable blend of Bergamot, Almond, Rose, Jasmine and character.

Today's choice is Miss Armaf Attitude, a fragrance crafted for those who aren't afraid to stand out. The transition from the bright floral-nutty top notes to the rich coffee heart and warm, woody vanilla base is absolute magic.
Miss Armaf Attitude ✨ A bold, feminine scent with sparkling florals, creamy almond, rich coffee, and a warm vanilla-amber finish. Confident. Sweet. Unforgettable.
Power does not need to shout. A deep foundation of smoldering lava smoke, raw vetiver, and dark cocoa that shifts the atmosphere. Armaf Old Money holds the final word.
True refinement is never rushed. A heavy core of Tuscan iris and coffee praline melting into dark cedarwood. Armaf Old Money dictates the pace.
The weight of legacy. A sharp rush of black pepper and silky lavender that immediately commands the room. Armaf Old Money sets an undeniable standard.
Calculated impact. Crisp pear and bright mandarin cut through the noise, leaving a deep trace of warm amber. Oros Donna takes up space.
Absolute presence. A magnetic pull of orange blossom and raw musk that commands the room. Oros Donna dictates the terms.
Dictating the mood from the moment you arrive. A bright citrus opening fades into a deep wash of vanilla and patchouli. Oros Donna shifts the entire atmosphere.
For the woman whose love is timeless, graceful, and unforgettable. This Mother’s Day, celebrate her with a fragrance as beautiful as every memory she’s given you.

Golden hour is a state of mind. ✨ Let the hypnotic blend of wild blossoms and sun-ripened citrus carry you away from the everyday. Bold, fresh, and unapologetically captivating. What reality are you stepping into today?

Where does your mind wander when you close your eyes? 🌿🍊 Lose yourself in the surreal citrus dream of Odyssey Mandarin Sky. Watch as crisp, earthy greens dissolve into a sun-drenched grove of endless summer.

Unexpected elements, perfectly balanced. 💧🍊 The cool touch of crafted blue leather meets the vibrant, untamed burst of fresh mandarin. Odyssey Mandarin Sky isn't just a fragrance; it's a sudden shift in reality.

This isn't your average sweet treat, it's a captivating fragrance that balances playful energy with pure elegance. It opens with a mouth-watering pop of bright citrus and juicy cherry before unexpectedly melting into a sophisticated, powdery heart of rose and delicate white florals.
A little mess never looked (or smelled) so good. Yum Yum from the Delights collection is made for the playful ones who aren’t afraid of a little indulgence.🍨💜

Warning: May cause extreme cravings. ⚠️💜 Serve up some serious sweetness with Yum Yum. A delicious swirl of bright citrus and juicy cherry, melting into a beautifully soft heart of rose and white florals. it’s an elegant yet playful scent that leaves an irresistible trail wherever you go. 🍒🍦✨....no calories attached.
Bright days, fresh blooms, and a spritz of sunshine. ☀️🍋 Odyssey Limoni is giving ultimate spring vibes.
Sunbeams and bright citrus. ☀️🍋 The only accessory I need today.

Squeeze the day! 🍋 Catching nothing but good vibes and fresh energy with Odyssey Limoni. It’s pure zesty perfection and the ultimate mood-booster for those days when you need to feel vibrant and unstoppable.

A daily dose of sugar without the calories. 🎀 Treating myself to the ultimate sweet escape with Odyssey Candee today. Because you deserve to smell just as amazing as you feel! Drop a 🍬 if you love a sweet fragrance.
Serving main character energy with a side of sweetness. 💅 Every time I wear Odyssey Candee, it’s a guaranteed "what are you wearing?" moment. Long-lasting, head-turning, and unapologetically bold.
Smells like an absolute dream. ☁️🍓 Bottling up all the good vibes with Odyssey Candee today. If you’re looking for a scent that perfectly balances sweet notes with an alluring edge, this is the one.

Main character energy unlocked. 💖 Odyssey Pink Pop isn't just a fragrance, it's an entire candy land fantasy. Wrapped in unapologetic hot pink with electric blue and lime green pops , this scent is for the ones who live fast, stand out, and crave that sweet thrill.
Step into a candy land fantasy with Odyssey Pink Pop! This lively Fruity-Floral fragrance opens with a juicy burst of mandarin, peach, and raspberry that melts into a delicious fruity medley.
Introducing Odyssey Pink Pop, and no, you've never smelled anything like it. Juicy fruits Delicate florals Creamy vanilla finish. Light. Happy. Impossible to ignore. Shop now, link in bio.
Moving at your own pace. A soft haze of davana, wild rose, and white musk blurs the line between reality and the daydream. Unbothered energy in every drop.
Total indulgence without the apology. A smooth foundation of warm vanilla and amber settles into the skin. Armaf Island Breeze dictates the mood.
Pure escapism on demand. A sudden hit of pink peach and wild berries completely shifts the atmosphere. Armaf Island Breeze sets a new frequency.
Island Bliss is for those who are always up for a good time.
Add a sprinkle of joy and a dash of fun to your life. It’s all about embracing your spirit and letting your playful side shine.
Are you always up for a good time? We got you! Discover this wild ride of berries, coconut and orange blossom, guaranteed to blow your mind.
Meet your next obsession. Bon Bon blends juicy sweetness with soft florals and a warm, creamy base that lasts all day.
Bon Bon blends fruity freshness with creamy warmth for a scent that stays on your skin and on their mind.
Spring has a scent. Make it yours. Up to 25% off ARMAF fragrances, for a limited time only. https://armaf.com/collections/spring-deals

A Delights Collection standout. Bon Bon blends mandarin, bergamot, papaya, tea blossom, and marine notes into a soft, fruity‑fresh breeze wrapped in creamy gourmand warmth. Bright, sweet, and effortlessly charming.

A juicy burst of litchi and sunlit fruits opens Odyssey Li’Chi Lush Eau de Parfum, unfolding into a soft, creamy floral heart of peony, rose and jasmine, before melting into warm vanilla, caramel and smooth woods. Sweet, luminous and effortlessly addictive. Discover it now at armaf.com.

Spring is here, bringing light, warmth and a fresh sense of everything. Odyssey Li’Chi Lush Eau de Parfum captures the season with a juicy burst of litchi and sunlit fruits, blooming into soft florals and settling into a warm, sweet trail of vanilla and caramel. Step into the season at armaf.com.

Oyssey Li’Chi Lush opens with a bright, juicy burst of litchi, mandarin and ripe fruits that feel instantly alive on the skin. As it evolves, a soft floral heart of peony, rose and jasmine melts into a creamy, romantic layer that feels effortless and unique.

She moves with intention, leaving traces of something unforgettable. Not loud, not forced. Just undeniable. A presence that lingers long after she’s gone. For the woman who doesn’t chase attention. She becomes it.
Deeply rooted and constantly blooming. A presence that transforms the atmosphere just by existing. Here is to the women who cultivate their own beauty.
Wearing her power like royalty. She commands the elements and sets her own standard. Celebrating the women who rule their own world.
Armaf Perle d'Or wraps you in a golden aura. It’s the perfect alchemy of delicate florals and deep, radiant sweetness, designed for those who command the spotlight with quiet, effortless elegance.
Luxury in every drop, crafted with the signature Armaf intensity, Perle d'Or is a statement that lingers long after you've left the room.

A masterpiece of contrasts, with a luminous spark of citrus and pink peppercorn, melting seamlessly into an intoxicating heart of warm vanilla and rich caramel. A sophisticated gourmand that balances bright freshness with addictive, creamy depth.

ASD MARKET WEEK • LAS VEGAS ✅ What an incredible week! A big thank you to all the clients and creators who stopped by the Armaf booth to explore our world of fragrances and discover our latest novelties. We loved connecting, sharing, and showcasing what’s new. �Stay tuned for more exciting launches and visit www.armaf.com to explore more. ✨
Bold, relentless, and completely her own. She does not blend in. She sets the frequency. Celebrating the vibrant energy of women who redefine the rules.
Day 2 of ASD Las Vegas ✅ See you tomorrow for the final day ✨
Fearless vision and absolute focus. She commands attention not by asking for it but by simply arriving. Here is to the women who own their entire narrative.
Day 1 at ASD Market Week, Las Vegas ✅ Great energy, great people, and a strong start. Thank you to everyone who stopped by! 📍Visit us at booth #N21127 #asdmarketweek #armaf #fragrance
Multi-faceted and impossible to ignore. Her brilliance shifts and shines from every angle. A tribute to the dynamic women who bring their own light to the world.
A radiant force that shines entirely from within. She naturally commands the spotlight without ever asking for permission. Here is to the brilliance of women who light up the room.
Unapologetic confidence and total control. She owns the room, sets the standard, and wears her power perfectly. A tribute to the women who lead the way.
Complex, rare, and impossible to replicate. Her strength is built from the richest elements. Celebrate the depth and undeniable value of women everywhere.
ASD Market Week just got more intense. Meet Armaf and experience fragrance at its finest. 📍 Las Vegas Convention Center | North Hall

Two fragrances. Two expressions. One unforgettable presence. Salsa ignites the air with playful energy and vibrant allure.Tango unfolds with depth, bold, sensual, undeniably magnetic.Together, they don’t follow the rhythm… they set the tempo.Introducing ARMAF’s newest statement.Which rhythm speaks to you?

Meet Salsa, lively, radiant, full of movement, and Tango, slow, intense, irresistibly magnetic. Two fragrances inspired by rhythm, passion, and presence. Not just worn performed. A new duo from ARMAF.

When rhythm becomes fragrance. Salsa arrives with brightness, energy, and effortless charm. Tango follows with depth, intensity, and undeniable allure. Two scents inspired by movement, passion, and presence. Introducing the newest creations from ARMAF. Which one will you wear tonight?
Softness is its own kind of power. She builds her own pedestals and sets her own standards. A tribute to the women who balance delicate beauty with undeniable strength.
Delicate on the outside. Fearless within. Club de Nuit Woman Extrait. #ARMAF #CDN #ExtraitDeParfum #WomensFragrance #Sophisticated
Softness is not weakness. It's power with grace. #ARMAF #ClubDeNuit #WomanExtrait #FragranceLover #Feminine

topContent.caption: Effervescent, playful, and completely unique. Armaf Odyssey Soda Pop is a vibrant citrus blend that balances an energetic opening with a smooth, magnetic dry-down of tonka bean and sandalwood. Perfect for those who light up every room.
Power does not need to shout. A deep foundation of smoldering lava smoke, raw vetiver, and dark cocoa that shifts the atmosphere. Armaf Old Money holds the final word.
Chilled cola, bright citrus, and vanilla bourbon. 🧊🍋🥃 Your fragrance wardrobe just got a major, effervescent upgrade with Armaf Odyssey Soda Pop.

She moves with intention, leaving traces of something unforgettable. Not loud, not forced. Just undeniable. A presence that lingers long after she’s gone. For the woman who doesn’t chase attention. She becomes it.
Meet your new date night signature: Armaf Odyssey Artisto. The kind of fragrance that makes them lean in just a little bit closer.

Pop the top on playful energy with Armaf Odyssey Soda Pop. 🥤🍋 This fragrance opens with an unexpected, icy splash of chilled cola, mint, and zesty citrus. As it settles, it melts into a warm, spiced heart of black tea and cinnamon, finishing with an intoxicating trail of Vanilla Bourbon and Amberwood. Smell the spark.
Sometimes life forces you to grow. What you become after is your choice.

Oyssey Li’Chi Lush opens with a bright, juicy burst of litchi, mandarin and ripe fruits that feel instantly alive on the skin. As it evolves, a soft floral heart of peony, rose and jasmine melts into a creamy, romantic layer that feels effortless and unique.

The Odyssey Fragrance Drop is here. 4 Scents, 4 Moods. One Question: Which one are you? 👇 Shop now at Armaf.com #OdysseyDrop #FragranceTok #PerfumeOfTheDay #SmellGoodFeelGood#SignatureScent #OdysseybyARMAF
Celebrate the beauty of the game and the quiet victories that follow with Club de Nuit Intense Man.
The icon, elevated. Club de Nuit Intense Man Extrait. #ARMAF #CDNIM #Extrait #MensFragrance #BeastMode

Spring is here, bringing light, warmth and a fresh sense of everything. Odyssey Li’Chi Lush Eau de Parfum captures the season with a juicy burst of litchi and sunlit fruits, blooming into soft florals and settling into a warm, sweet trail of vanilla and caramel. Step into the season at armaf.com.
